title: [YTP] Advertisements Up Your Ads-hole!
description:
Featuring more ways to get rid of whatever money you may have had in the 80s and 90s.

Ironically I'm not putting ads on this video, lul.  Oh yeah, and I made the captions myself this time.

Song used in credits is "James Reynolds - Technodance" from the 1990 computer animation film "The Mind's Eye": https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pRoS3n5Cn80
